caption: A man wearing a black baseball cap, a black t-shirt with the text "CHECK IT!" on the front, and headphones is seated in a studio. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone on a boom arm. The background is a light-colored wall featuring logos that include the words "BOSS HUSTLE" and stars. To his right, a partial sign reads "BOSS TALK 101". Overlaying the bottom of the scene is a graphic that says "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST". Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing. He begins by looking slightly to the side, then shifts his gaze and moves his right arm. In the final moments, he raises his right hand, gesturing with his fingers while speaking and looking toward someone off-screen. He wears a gold chain around his neck and a bracelet on his right wrist.
